package.name: recovery_g1
package.description: Recovery node for G1 ROS2 Pipeline. Consumes SafetyEvents and SystemState to evaluate RecoveryActions. Publishes RecoveryEvent to /recovery_events. Publishes heartbeat to /diagnostics. Defined by RECOVERY_MODEL_G1.md + RESILIENCE_MODEL_G1.md. Recovery logic TBD — pending SDK G1. Does NOT modify /system_state. Does NOT execute transitions. Does NOT perform real node restarts in this skeleton.
